name: Microsoft Entra ID
description: Microsoft Entra ID (Azure AD) cloud identity provider via Microsoft Graph API for user management, group membership, session revocation, and sign-in activity

integration_id_config.description: Unique identifier for this Microsoft Entra ID integration instance

client_id.description: Application (client) ID from Azure App Registration

client_secret.description: Client secret value from Azure App Registration

base_url.description: Microsoft Graph API base URL (change for sovereign clouds)

actions.name: Health Check
actions.description: Verify API connectivity to Microsoft Entra ID by acquiring a token and querying the users endpoint

actions.name: Get User
actions.description: Look up a user by UPN, email address, or object ID and return their attributes

user_id.description: User principal name, email, or Azure AD object ID

actions.name: Disable User
actions.description: Disable a user account by blocking sign-in (sets accountEnabled to false)

user_id.description: User principal name, email, or Azure AD object ID

actions.name: Enable User
actions.description: Re-enable a user account by allowing sign-in (sets accountEnabled to true)

user_id.description: User principal name, email, or Azure AD object ID

actions.name: Reset Password
actions.description: Force a password reset for a user with an optional temporary password

user_id.description: User principal name, email, or Azure AD object ID

force_change.description: Require password change on next sign-in (default: true)

actions.name: List Groups
actions.description: List the groups a user belongs to

user_id.description: User principal name, email, or Azure AD object ID

actions.name: Get Group Members
actions.description: List members of a specific group

actions.name: Revoke Sessions
actions.description: Revoke all active sign-in sessions for a user, forcing re-authentication on all devices

user_id.description: User principal name, email, or Azure AD object ID

actions.name: List Sign-Ins
actions.description: Get recent sign-in activity for a user from Azure AD audit logs

user_id.description: User principal name to filter sign-in logs

top.description: Maximum number of sign-in records to return (default: 50)
